description_long: This is a freestanding rectangular banner with a wide, flat display surface supported by two angled legs. The front and back surfaces feature a red geometric pattern with a white logo and the word 'seg' prominently displayed in the center. The banner's surface appears to be made of a fabric or vinyl material stretched tightly over a rigid frame. The supporting structure is minimal, with thin metal legs extending outward for stability. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for use in public or commercial spaces. The banner is likely lightweight and portable, intended for temporary placement at events or in urban environments.
description: A freestanding rectangular banner with a red geometric pattern, white logo, and thin metal support legs. The design is modern and portable, ideal for public or commercial display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red patterned banner face with the white 'seg' logo and supporting legs visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banner and the horizontal extension of the support legs.
description_view_2: Back view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same red pattern and logo with supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the outward extension of the support legs.
